jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - ICAT - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
ICAT, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Teacher for our Agra operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About ICAT:
ICAT is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Support students with special educational needs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Educational Technology
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Communication Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ICAT!
